data.title: Bitcoin hits new high at $72K with $280M in shorts liquidated. Global markets surge post US-Iran ceasefire; BTC bear positions remain open.
data.description: The ceasefire agreement between the US and Iran led to a rally in Bitcoin and global markets. However, despite this positive movement, the latest data indicates that the majority of Bitcoin bears have yet to close their positions. This indicates ongoing uncertainty in the market despite the recent upturn.

data.title: Raiffeisen Bank reaffirms long-standing commitment to powering core retail services with Finastra
data.description: Finastra, a renowned financial services software leader, has revealed a successful partnership of more than three decades with Raiffeisen Bank Hungary. This collaboration has significantly contributed to supporting bank operations and serving millions of customers across various countries. The strong relationship between these two entities continues to thrive as they work together to provide essential financial services. The announcement was made in London on April 9, 2026.

data.title: TON Price Prediction: Toncoin at $1.23, may hit $1.30 by month-end. Neutral RSI (42.88) hints at possible rise soon.
data.description: Toncoin is currently trading at $1.23 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) sitting at 42.88. Analysts predict a potential increase to the $1.30 resistance level within the next 30 days if buyers manage to surpass the current consolidation pattern.

data.title: Leads Biolabs’ Opamtistomig (PD-L1/4-1BB Bispecific Antibody) Advances to Expansion Phase in First-Line Biliary Tract Cancer Following Positive Safety and Preliminary Efficacy Results
data.description: Nanjing-based company Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. revealed the development of a novel PD-L1/4-1BB bispecific antibody. The company, listed as Stock Code 9887.HK, made the announcement.

data.title: Circus Awarded Public Procurement Contract by Lithuanian Armed Forces on NATO Eastern Flank
data.description: A company based in Munich, Circus SE, recently revealed its triumph in securing a procurement tender for delivering the initial completely autonomous AI-driven sustainment robot to the Lithuanian Armed Forces stationed in Vilnius. The company, identifiable through ISIN code DE000A2YN355 and XETRA code CA1, emerged as the chosen contender among a pool of competitors in a rigorous public procurement procedure. Per the agreement, Circus will incorporate its AI robotic innovation into the current barracks setup and subject it to assessments during military operational and training activities.

data.title: CoinW Partners with Luka Modrić as Global Brand Ambassador
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 9, 2026, CoinW, a leading global cryptocurrency trading platform, revealed a significant collaboration with Luka Modrić, the revered Croatian footballer and Ballon d'Or recipient. Modrić, renowned as one of football's premier figures, will serve as the platform's new Global Brand Ambassador.

data.title: SentiAvatar, the First Interactive 3D Digital Human Framework from SentiPulse and GSAI, Now Open Source
data.description: A recent announcement from SentiPulse, an AI company based in JINAN, China, on April 9, 2026, has introduced a comprehensive release featuring a motion dataset, foundation model, and streaming architecture. This release is tailored to harmonize speech, gesture, and expression within real-time conversations. SentiPulse is renowned for its specialization in emotional foundation models and enhancing user experiences.

data.title: SHIB price prediction: Expect consolidation phase with neutral RSI at 47.95 and bearish MACD, signaling limited price movement in compressed ranges.
data.description: The Shiba Inu coin currently has a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 47.95 and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Based on technical analysis, it indicates a period of sideways consolidation with restricted price movement within narrow ranges.

data.title: Certes Extends Breakthrough PQC Protection Delivering Quantum-Safe Data Security Across Any App, Any Infrastructure, Anywhere
data.description: Certes has launched v7 of its Data Protection and Risk Mitigation (DPRM) solution, providing sovereign and crypto-agile protection from servers to edges within hybrid and multi-cloud setups. The update aims to enhance security across various environments. The launch took place on April 9, 2026, in Pittsburgh. Certes is known for its expertise in data-centric security and Post-Quantum Cryptography, making it a prominent player in the field.
